entity.label: Beth-dagon
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city in the low country or plain of Judah, near Philistia (Josh. 15:41); the modern Beit Degan, about 5 miles from Lydda.

nodes.label: Beth-dagon
nodes.description: A city in the low country or plain of Judah, near Philistia (Josh. 15:41); the modern Beit Degan, about 5 miles from Lydda.

verses.text: And Gederoth, Bethdagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:
